title: rhamnus dumetorum
intro: Rhamnus dumetorum, also known as the thorny buckthorn or prickly buckthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This shrub-like plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhamnus dumetorum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rhamnus dumetorum typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves or bark of the plant.
